nasb.text: Then he said, “Do you understand why I came to you? But I shall now return to fight against the prince of Persia; so I am going forth, and behold, the prince of Greece is about to come.

esv.text: Then he said, “Do you know why I have come to you? But now I will return to fight against the prince of Persia; and when I go out, behold, the prince of Greece will come.

cnv.text: 他說：“現在我要回去和波斯的護衛天使作戰；我一離去，希臘的護衛天使就要來。但你知道我為甚麼到你這裡來嗎？

ccb.text: 他说：“你知道我为什么要到你这里来吗？现在我要回去与波斯的守护神争战。我离开后，希腊的守护神就会来。
